title: Claustodian Index
description: The rolled-up list of all Claude Code versions tracked by Claustodian (data/index.json).

schemaVersion.description: The Claustodian data-format schema version this index conforms to.

latest.description: The most recent Claude Code version tracked.

versions.description: All Claude Code versions tracked, each with a corresponding data/versions/X.Y.Z.json snapshot.
